sentences.arabic: يُعَدُّ الْهَاتِفُ الذَّكِيُّ جُزْءًا مُهِمًّا مِنْ حَيَاتِنَا الْيَوْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Pametni telefon se smatra važnim dijelom našeg svakodnevnog života.
sentences.translationEn: The smartphone is considered an important part of our daily life.

sentences.arabic: نَسْتَخْدِمُ هَذِهِ الْأَجْهِزَةَ لِلتَّوَاصُلِ مَعَ الْأَصْدِقَاءِ وَالْعَائِلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Koristimo ove uređaje za komunikaciju s prijateljima i porodicom.
sentences.translationEn: We use these devices to communicate with friends and family.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا نَسْتَطِيعُ تَحْمِيلَ تَطْبِيقَاتٍ مُفِيدَةٍ لِلدِّرَاسَةِ وَالْعَمَلِ.
sentences.translation: Također možemo preuzeti korisne aplikacije za učenje i posao.
sentences.translationEn: We can also download useful applications for study and work.

sentences.arabic: أَصْبَحَ الْإِنْتَرْنِتُ مُتَوَفِّرًا فِي كُلِّ مَكَانٍ بِفَضْلِ هَذِهِ التَّقْنِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Internet je postao dostupan svuda zahvaljujući ovoj tehnologiji.
sentences.translationEn: The internet has become available everywhere thanks to this technology.
